title: Rugby trip a real hoot
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A group of avid Springbok...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A group of avid Springbok supporters from Knysna, Plettenberg Bay and George, driving an old Dodge bus sporting Springbok paraphernalia, were hooted all the way into Gqeberha on Saturday 12 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A group of avid Springbok supporters from Knysna, Plettenberg Bay and George, driving an old Dodge bus sporting Springbok paraphernalia, were hooted all the way into Gqeberha on Saturday 12 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The dozen Bok enthusiasts caused quite a scene driving to St George's Park where they parked the bus, owned by Knysna businessman Dick Goullee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""It was like being in a wedding parade, sooo much hooting," said Plett resident Noel "Zippy" Shaw. "We all found the atmosphere in the stadium unbelievable. PE put on an unforgettable experience."","html":""It was like being in a wedding parade, sooo much hooting," said Plett resident Noel "Zippy" Shaw. "We all found the atmosphere in the stadium unbelievable. PE put on an unforgettable experience.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Attraction","html":"Attraction"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Around the stadium, too, there was a sea of jolly supporters as people waited to enter. The Springboks delivered the most enjoyable result (for their supporters) – a 45-0 drubbing of the Italians.","html":"Around the stadium, too, there was a sea of jolly supporters as people waited to enter. The Springboks delivered the most enjoyable result (for their supporters) – a 45-0 drubbing of the Italians."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And there was also a Plett attraction on the field – Bok replacement prop Asenathi Nhlabakanye, who is formerly from Plettenberg Bay (The Crags).","html":"And there was also a Plett attraction on the field – Bok replacement prop Asenathi Nhlabakanye, who is formerly from Plettenberg Bay (The Crags)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
